content: Start with one short warm background question about what product decisions she has been closest to lately, then one short follow-up on how much of the prioritization call she personally carries versus with design, engineering, or leadership. After that, stay on one recent real roadmap or feature-priority decision. Before any concept exposure, explicitly cover all five items: the recent event itself, what evidence was still missing, what stakeholder or time pressure existed, what she could defend publicly versus what still felt privately uncertain, and what she actually changed in scope, sequence, priority, or go-no-go.
superseded_question: 可唔可以同我講下你最近一次真係要決定 roadmap 或 feature priority 嘅情況？
